$schema_notes:
Retrospective + forward feature list. Schema per entry:
  id, priority, area, title, user_visible_behavior, status, verification, verification_command, evidence, last_verified_commit, notes
Status: not_started | in_progress | blocked | passing | wont_do.
Only one feature may be 'in_progress' at any time (WIP=1).
Status transitions to 'passing' ONLY when scripts/verify.sh has confirmed the verification_command exits 0 and that commit hash is recorded in last_verified_commit.
Status 'wont_do' is the terminal state for entries explicitly dropped — kept for history to prevent re-queueing under a different name. Notes must record the decision.
Add new entries with status='not_started' BEFORE starting work.

features.title: Delete this entry and add your first real feature
features.verification: How another agent confirms this works.
features.notes: This is a template. The harness reads status/priority/title from each entry.
